summary: Tested Cost Cards module - all 17 backend API tests passed, frontend UI verified. CRUD operations, bulk save, filtering, and for-distributor endpoint all working correctly. Page renders with inline editable grid, filter dropdowns, Add Row and Save Changes buttons.

integration_issues.issue: When switching from Sales to Distribution module via dropdown, the sidebar doesn't always update immediately. Cost Cards is not visible in sidebar when accessed from Sales context, but page is accessible via direct URL /cost-cards
integration_issues.note: This is a pre-existing module context issue, not specific to Cost Cards. The page works correctly when accessed directly.

seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: 3 cost cards (Hyderabad=125.50, New Delhi=130.00, Noida=128.75 for SKU 'Nyla - 660 ml / Sparkling')
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cost Cards module fully implemented and working. Backend: GET /api/cost-cards (list with filters), POST /api/cost-cards (create), PUT /api/cost-cards/{id} (update), DELETE /api/cost-cards/{id} (delete), PUT /api/cost-cards/bulk/save (bulk upsert), GET /api/cost-cards/for-distributor/{id} (distributor-specific with override info). Frontend: CostCards.js at /cost-cards with inline editable grid, city/SKU filters, Add Row, Save Changes, delete per row. Sidebar entry under Distribution module group.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/cost-cards returns 200 with cost_cards, cities, skus arrays - PASSED
Cost card entry has required fields (id, sku_id, city, cost_per_unit) - PASSED
POST /api/cost-cards rejects duplicate city+sku with 400 - PASSED
PUT /api/cost-cards/{id} with invalid ID returns 404 - PASSED
DELETE /api/cost-cards/{id} with invalid ID returns 404 - PASSED
PUT /api/cost-cards/bulk/save updates existing by ID - PASSED
PUT /api/cost-cards/bulk/save updates existing by city+sku match - PASSED
For-distributor response has has_override and effective_price fields - PASSED
Existing test data present (Hyderabad, New Delhi, Noida) - PASSED
Cost values stored with 2 decimal places - PASSED
frontend_ui_tests: Cost Cards page loads at /cost-cards (data-testid='cost-cards-page') - PASSED
Add Row button visible and works (data-testid='add-row-btn') - PASSED
3 existing cost card rows displayed - PASSED
3 inline editable cost inputs present (data-testid='cost-input-{id}') - PASSED
Inline editing highlights row and enables Save Changes button - PASSED
Add Row creates new row with city/SKU dropdowns - PASSED
Save Changes button shows badge with pending changes count - PASSED

api_endpoints_verified.GET /api/cost-cards: List all cost cards with filter dropdowns data
api_endpoints_verified.GET /api/cost-cards/for-distributor/{id}: Get cost cards for distributor with override info
